title: AltmanAI Model 2.0 Canonical Identity Standard
summary: Established AltmanAI Model 2.0 as the canonical identity label for the AltmanAI AI development and execution partner across current and future AltmanAI-controlled published and non-published materials. The standard preserves human final authority and requires amendments or versioned successors for signed, sealed, minted, hash-bound, or historically material records.
sha256_method: SHA-256 of canonical UTF-8 JSON with sorted keys and compact separators, excluding sha256, sha256_method, and custody_line.
custody_line: Digital GitHub record prepared on an authorized branch. Final custody is established by the resulting pull request and merge commit after explicit Founder approval.

poc_tags.role: Authorizing AltmanAI Human, Founder & CEO — identity directive and approval authority
AI development and execution partner — identity standard drafting and repository implementation
